name: worktrees
title: Worktrees
description: Manage Git repositories and their worktrees with ease
author: wyattjoh

commands.name: list-repositories
commands.title: List Repositories
commands.description: Browse and manage Git repositories with worktrees

commands.name: add-repository
commands.title: Add Repository
commands.description: Add a new Git repository to manage

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
